Voice.title: Voice
Voice.description: An AI voice model used for cloning and song generation.

avatar.description: URL to the voice's avatar image.

description.description: Short description of the voice's characteristics.

isPublic.description: Whether the voice is available to all users.

creatorId.description: UID of the user who created the voice.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the voice was created.

Song.title: Song
Song.description: An original song or stem set used as a source.

thumbnail.description: URL to the song's thumbnail image.

userId.description: UID of the user who uploaded the song.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the song was uploaded.

thumbnail.description: URL to the cover's thumbnail image.

audioUrl.description: URL to the generated audio file.

voiceId.description: ID of the voice used for the cover.

voiceName.description: Name of the voice used for the cover.

userId.description: UID of the user who generated the cover.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cover was generated.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: A background task for voice training or song generation.

targetId.description: ID of the voice or song being processed.

userId.description: UID of the user who initiated the job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

/songs.description: Collection of original songs and stems.

/covers.description: Collection of generated AI song covers.

/jobs.description: Collection of active and completed background tasks.
